subcodes.title: Interview with five American teachers, Haifa, 1914-07-21
subcodes.first_line: The true, liberal, religious spirit is more in evidence in America…. The Baha'is are a community of cooperative servants, they have no leader. Their only leader is God.
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Western values; culture, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
